propositions: The verify-identity.yaml workflow already mounts the tickets branch as a worktree so rebar verify-identity scans real events instead of exiting 2 (store-not-found).
The gate posture is config-driven via identity.require_authenticated (currently false, making it advisory/exit-0) rather than a hard-forced --require-authenticated flag.
The grandfathering boundary is controlled by REBAR_IDENTITY_ENFORCE_SINCE as a CI env override versus identity.enforce_since in rebar.toml.
The grandfathering boundary must be set to an appropriate ref before enforcement is flipped on so pre-enforcement unsigned events are grandfathered and the gate is not spuriously red.
These behaviors and distinctions must be confirmed and documented in docs/identity.md's verify-identity gate section.
